title: Tunlys Zoom
description: Tunlys Zoom Mod is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that adds smooth, rebindable zoom controls to Minecraft. It supports hold and toggle zoom, mouse wheel zoom adjustment, and optional Mod Menu settings like hiding the HUD while zooming.
body:
**Tunlys Zoom Mod** is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that adds comfortable zoom controls to Minecraft.

It includes two rebindable keybinds: one for holding zoom and one for toggling zoom on or off. While zooming, you can use the mouse wheel to smoothly adjust the zoom level closer or farther away. The mod also includes optional Mod Menu settings, including configurable zoom values, smooth zoom, scroll step size, and an option to hide the HUD while zooming.

This mod is client-side only and **does not** need to be installed on a server.
